title: $RTL_PRINTING
text: $RTL_PRINTING Determine processing required when printing right-to-left fields. $RTL_PRINTING { = } ProcessingCode Arguments Table 1. Processing Codes Code Description 0 No processing (default) 1 Mirroring of data in fields 2 Mirroring, plus character shaping 3 Mirroring, character shaping, plus ligation Defaults Assignment file: Any application assignment file Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: 0 Description $RTL_PRINTING determines the amount of processing that Uniface performs before printing right-to-left fields (for example, in an Arabic or Hebrew application). You can select the level of processing to be done depending on the capabilities of the printer being used. If the printer is able to handle right-to-left printing completely, the setting is not needed. Related Links Types of Character Sets The installable character sets can be either single-byte or double-byte. Single-byte character sets can be divided into left-to-right and right-to-left.
